programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: Tubig To Handle
programme.desc: Get ready to get soaked! 💦 Experience the wettest, wildest, and wackiest game show in the Philippines - Tubig To Handle!. Watch as fearless contestants dive headfirst into epic water obstacle challenges, face hilarious wipeouts, and battle it out for BIG prizes. From slippery slides to heart-pumping showdowns, every episode is packed with non-stop action, laughter, and pure Pinoy fun. Hosted by Yassi Pressman and your favorite stars, this splash-filled adventure is guaranteed to bring nonstop laughter, thrills, and all-out water fun like never before!

programme.title: Fun With Okinawa Dialects
programme.desc: Get familiar with Okinawa dialects by listening to folk tales and children's songs.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 9
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: Special programs ranging from entertainment shows to documentaries will be shown.

programme.title: Songs For Everyone
programme.desc: A song program where children can sing along by reading the lyrics on the screen.

programme.title: Fun With Japanese
programme.desc: Each episode focuses on a word as a theme, exploring its meaning and history while discovering the charm of Japanese language. The program also features dance performances of quotes from the world's great figures, visits schools to interact with children, and introduces classical performing arts and songs, making it enjoyable for both children and adults.

programme.title: Saturday Watch 9
programme.desc: A Saturday night show presents the latest news on domestic and foreign affairs with reliable coverage and innovative presentation.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Ginbayashi Yoko (Koike Eiko), a world-class chef, loses everything when her restaurant's owner vanishes with the profits. Now supporting two children, she takes a job as a prison nutritionist, where her inventive meals begin to win over inmates. But when a former inmate is arrested again, Yoko is forced to confront a difficult question: Can people truly change? A new quest begins - earning three “Musholan” stars behind bars.

programme.title: E9 - Barbary Macaques
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the rock of Gibraltar, in Europe, to count all the barbary macaques that live there.

programme.title: E9 - Barbary Macaques
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the rock of Gibraltar, in Europe, to count all the barbary macaques that live there.

programme.title: E1 - The Carrot Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E35 - Smoochy Kiss
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: E10 - Thomas Makes A Mistake
programme.desc: After Thomas makes a mistake with an important silk delivery in India, he causes chaos and confusion by not seeking help.

programme.title: E11 - Grudge Match
programme.desc: Raul, the Brazilian tank engine, wants to beat Thomas in a game. But Raul's super-competitive nature soon gets him into trouble.

programme.title: E35 - The Great Pacific Garbage Patch
programme.desc: When a storm washes up plastic litter onto the Academy beach, the Go Jetters leave Ubercorn, Grandmaster Glitch and the cadets behind and head to the North Pacific Ocean in Jet Pad.

programme.title: E9 - Pirate Parade
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo fix Ted up as a pirate ship for the Pirate Parade, but swashbuckling Cap'n Dot hijacks him! Team Mojo must out-pirate Dot and sail the streets to stop her.

programme.title: E10 - Dot Pursuit
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to make sure Dot doesn't see her present before her birthday party. But that's easier said than done when Dot becomes an unstoppable present-hunting machine.

programme.title: E23 - Kite Plight
programme.desc: Evil Pea uses her balloon to cut down everyone's kites so she can rule the supermarket skies. Supertato and Carrot must use chopsticks to stop her.

programme.title: E12 - The Teamwork Badge
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E34 - The Dump
programme.desc: On a trip to the Dump, Dad claims he's the best at everything. But Bluey discovers that Dad's throwing out her old drawing and questions if he really is the best Dad in the world.

programme.title: Fly Me to The Saitama – FROM BIWA LAKE WITH LOVE
programme.desc: A live-action film adaptation of Mineo Maya's “Fly Me to the Saitama” turned out to be a huge, unexpected box office hit of 2019. With the producers who took the demand for a sequel as real, the cast and crew got back together to complete the second chapter of the urban legend in Fly Me To The Saitama -FROM BIWA LAKE WITH LOVE-. In addition to the biting yet affectionate dissing of Saitama and the Kanto region in the first film, the sequel contains an even more scathing dissing of the Kansai region. Alongside costars GACKT and Fumi Nikaido, Ryo Kato and Tsubasa Masuwaka reprise their roles as members of the Saitama Liberation Front. A crucial protagonist who joins their battle, Kai Kikyo, the handsome leader of the Shiga Liberation Front, is played by Anne in her first role as male character. Akira Kashoji, the ruthless governor of Osaka and kingpin of the Kansai region who stands in the way of Rei and others, is played by Ainosuke Kataoka. In addition to Norika Fujiwara and

programme.title: Haunting Call
programme.desc: Lily, a popular YouTuber reeling from her boyfriend's betrayal, discovers a haunted phone belonging to Xiaoya, a bullied high school student who tragically took her own life. As eerie messages and calls pull Lily into Xiaoya's ghost world, she learns of the spirit's desire for revenge against those who hurt her. Empathizing with Xiaoya's pain, Lily begins to understand the quest for justice. However, she soon realizes that helping Xiaoya seek vengeance comes at a steep cost, and some hauntings can never truly be escaped.

programme.title: i'm livin' it
programme.desc: Once a star in his finance firm, Bowen now spends his nights in a 24-hour fast food joint, where he encounters others “roommates” who are in a similar predicament: a mother with her daughter who has taken out high-interest loans to cover her mother-in-law's debt, an old man who is too afraid to go home, a young runaway, a young singer living in a temporary shelter. Together these accidental roommates must strive to lift one another out of rock bottom.

programme.title: E7 - Beloved Pets
programme.desc: Many pets share the lives of Parisians. They are becoming increasingly important: we love them, we spoil them, we pamper them. In addition to the cat bars that have been around for the past decade in the capital, there are now concept stores, dog festivals and spa hotels.

programme.title: E3 - Auto Retro Bourguebus
programme.desc: Meeting with the Auto Retro Bourguebus association. Laurent then goes to Ryes, to visit a couple of comic book professionals and admire their collector's Renault 4 CV. Michel presents a sporty Peugeot that was long unloved: the 309 GTI.

programme.title: E2 - Long Live Legumes
programme.desc: On the menu: lentils papet vaudois style and crispy chickpeas for the aperitif. Discovery of the day: Geneva longeole cooked on the plancha. Annick Jeanmairet is once again assisted by comedian Brigitte Rosset.

programme.title: E8 - Skate/Grillz/Beaubleu Watches
programme.desc: Since Paris Design Week 2024, skateboarding has been the future of design - and that's a pretty fun thought! Just like this latest craze, grillz for jewelled smiles. Beaubleu watches shows French seconds and skirts are now worn over trousers.

programme.title: E5 - La Molignee
programme.desc: On the road to the province of Namur and the Molignee valley, a picturesque location of high biological value and a Natura 2000 site. Detours to Sosoye and Falaen, among the most beautiful villages in Wallonia, the Abbey of Maredsous, Biesmeree and Florennes.

programme.title: E18 - Berry, The Heart's Choice
programme.desc: Just two hours from Paris, the Berry is a discreet and little-known land of rural charm and tranquil landscapes. Vast plains, dense forests and peaceful rivers form a simple, authentic picture, far from the hustle and bustle of the big cities, perfect for a revitalising getaway...

programme.desc: Viviane welcomes her first menswear designer! Louis Gabriel Nouchi presents his 2023-2024 autumn-winter collection, inspired by the novel ''American Psycho'' by Bret Easton Ellis.

Monkey Magic
programme.desc: When LingLing's grandmother, Princess Iron Fan, is kidnapped by the Monkey King, she sets off to rescue her. Rose, Hawk, and the team join her quest. Can they handle the mighty Buffalo King, Vicky's tricks, and lots of screaming monkeys?

programme.title: Skates 4 Skates
programme.desc: Flippy's skating tutorials made him a star on Instaclay. Seeing his reach, Carol wants skaters to support her campaigns. But to earn their respect, she'll need to skate. With Jessi's help, Carol trains hard to master three tricks that will win the crowd-and their cause.

programme.title: Trip to Senegal
programme.desc: Milo doesn't know what to do with his old broken skateboard. Zoe thinks it is useless, so it just needs to be thrown away, but Alim thinks otherwise. He knows that his friend Baidi can recycle anything and everything. Off they go to Senegal to meet Baidi!

programme.title: The Acid Test!
programme.desc: The doctors test how strong your stomach acid really is. And will it be Dr Chris, Dr Xand or Dr Ronx who gets snotted in Ouchology?

programme.title: Daisy and The Hippos
programme.desc: Daisy, the donkey, has a painful eye that needs sorting out. The Junior Vets give hungry hippos Ernie and Godzilla a dental check and find out if George the giraffe has any unwelcome guests.

programme.title: Stretchy Shrinky Hair
programme.desc: The doctors make the most of Mr. Grumbles' weekly shower to demonstrate how your hair has a secret skill enabling it to measure moisture in the air.

programme.title: Sloth Moths and Their Very Slow Host
programme.desc: For sloths, every day is a bad-hair day. Their matted locks are crawling with life - from parasites, to algae to a colony of sloth moths. Sloths provide a breeding ground for the moths too!

programme.title: Family Life in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Meet a peasant family in their daily lives, back in the Middle Ages. Dove and Howler are very busy parents! Besides educating their little urchin kids, welcoming a new baby, dealing with daily home life, life for these peasant parents is eventful to say the least!

programme.title: Day of the Invisibility
programme.desc: Sarah's bought a onesie that turns her invisible, and she and Ricky use it to play tricks on Gav. Ricky conjures a geometric kite design and fashions a stained-glass rocket inspired by Charles Rennie Mackintosh.

programme.title: Pneumatic Watermelon Squisher
programme.desc: Max and the gang build a drone-delivered coffee service, a vibrating headband, and a super juicer as they try to qualify for InventiveCon and find a way to keep Max's dad, Bryan, awake at the wheel.

programme.title: Mystery of the Headless Haunter
programme.desc: Addison has to solve the mystery of what's making scary sounds after Donnie convinces the other kids on an Ayrton Rangers camping trip that a mythical spook called the Headless Haunter is wandering through the park.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Curious Coin
programme.desc: Addison and Alex dig up what they think is an Ancient Roman coin in the community garden – then have a mystery to solve when it unexpectedly disappears.

programme.title: Day of the Angry Cloud
programme.desc: Ricky can't go out because of the rain, so he makes a water picture inspired by Turner and a 'whatever the weather' hat. When it turns out the weather isn't so bad, it inspires him to make art using a hose pipe and luminous paint.

programme.title: Luxury Treehouses
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents an inventor building mansions in trees, fingertip lighting, a book that filters water and a penguin chick bot that is giving researchers a new perspective on the penguin world.

programme.title: Stubble Fires
programme.desc: There is a dire situation in a large city in India. A group of students is protesting because the city's air has been replaced with an unbreathable icky cloud of pollution, and the authorities don't know why! Pluvia and Nubess are sent to solve the problem.

programme.title: Sloth Moths and Their Very Slow Host
programme.desc: For sloths, every day is a bad-hair day. Their matted locks are crawling with life - from parasites, to algae to a colony of sloth moths. Sloths provide a breeding ground for the moths too!

programme.title: The Electric Kettle
programme.desc: To get energy for his workout, Tom Thomas needs to cook something healthy without using the stove. He decides to cook oatmeal for the whole family.

programme.title: Trip to Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Milo battles with mosquitoes using an insecticide spray but realises he can't win. Our heroes decide to pay a visit to their penfriend in Papua New Guinea and learn how to co-exist alongside mosquitoes.

programme.title: Snot, Snot, Snot!
programme.desc: There's a MEGA-SNOTTING in Ouchology, while in the lab, the doctors use a giant crushing machine to test the strength of your teeth!

programme.title: Unhealthy Appetite
programme.desc: A puppy with a sore paw needs help, and the Junior Vets are in at the deep end when Lacey, the horse, undergoes major surgery. Johnny and Inel meet a cat with an unhealthy appetite for human snacks.

programme.title: Don't Panic About Puberty
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand take a look at what happens to your body when you reach puberty, and why it happens. They talk spots, sweat, and why you don't want to get up in the morning. They have some puberty survival tips and do some unusual house calls.

programme.title: Fearless Junior Vets
programme.desc: The fearless Junior Vets get in the shark tank, and dogs Boris and Red have surgery to help them go walkies. And Jane, the grey seal, is in bad shape after swimming into some fishing wire.

programme.title: Pneumatic Watermelon Squisher
programme.desc: Max and the gang build a drone-delivered coffee service, a vibrating headband, and a super juicer as they try to qualify for InventiveCon and find a way to keep Max's dad, Bryan, awake at the wheel.

programme.title: Daisy and The Hippos
programme.desc: Daisy, the donkey, has a painful eye that needs sorting out. The Junior Vets give hungry hippos Ernie and Godzilla a dental check and find out if George the giraffe has any unwelcome guests.

programme.title: Unhealthy Appetite
programme.desc: A puppy with a sore paw needs help, and the Junior Vets are in at the deep end when Lacey, the horse, undergoes major surgery. Johnny and Inel meet a cat with an unhealthy appetite for human snacks.

programme.title: Dhokha Round D Corner
programme.desc: A criminal breaks into a married couple's home and takes the wife hostage, igniting a tense standoff that surfaces secrets and lies.

programme.title: Bade Dilwala
programme.desc: A man upsets his wife by splitting a winning lottery ticket with a waitress.

Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: This HBO documentary looks at the nexus of money, politics and power – and a group of citizens as they fight to expose a campaign that has left a toxic legacy in America.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E1008 - My Phony Valentine / Man Of My Schemes
programme.desc: On Valentines Day, Rusty and his girlfriend, Amber, must hide their love when they realize their parents are business rivals. // When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: E106 - The Heat is on / Dig disaster
programme.desc: It's the Chahuta's Chili eating contest, and soon it's revealed Marcel's a cheat. // When Hope takes Gran Gran's special ladle to the park to play it ends up at Professor Lopez's archaeological dig.

programme.title: E1003 - Spy Dames / Cupid's Harrow
programme.desc: During Grandparent's Day at Lincoln's school, he and Myrtle face off with a spy nemesis from Myrtle's past. // Leni accidentally causes trouble for Lori and Bobby while taking calls on her and Miguel's dating podcast.

programme.title: E612 - Time Trap!
programme.desc: When the kids break Mom and Dad's priceless vase, they decide the only thing to do is go back in time to their wedding day, and prevent them from ever receiving it.

programme.title: E106 - The Heat is on / Dig disaster
programme.desc: It's the Chahuta's Chili eating contest, and soon it's revealed Marcel's a cheat. // When Hope takes Gran Gran's special ladle to the park to play it ends up at Professor Lopez's archaeological dig.

programme.title: E208 - Dubu / Jack's Day Off
programme.desc: Halmoni falls in love with a customer's dog. Rather than return him, she dog-naps him and goes on the lam! // Jack volunteers to run the Groom & Board solo, but when a pet snake causes chaos he must protect the other pets from the jaws of death!

programme.title: E120 - #MadAboutShoe
programme.desc: When Sam eats all of the moon meatballs Cat prepared for a Special Moon Dinner, Cat has to make more. Cat gets distracted when she finds a shoe and becomes obsessed with finding its matching pair.

programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.title: Trailblazing
programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. programme.title: E3 - Selena + Girl & The Goat
programme.desc: Selena Gomez steps up her game in Stephanie Izard's kitchen, where she is challenged with a blind taste test.

programme.title: E2 - Goldie Hawn Goes Overboard
programme.desc: Goldie Hawn goes overboard for her very close friend turned family who has been by her side for four decades.

programme.title: E8 - Ranch Birthday Party
programme.desc: Annie Starke and her mom, Glenn Close, are throwing a birthday bash for her aunt on their ranch.

programme.title: E10 - Over The Edge
programme.desc: When a witness sees a nightclub owner jump to his death from his fifth-floor condo, the case is seemingly open and shut; that is until Dr. Jennifer Nara's autopsy reveals shocking new evidence.

programme.title: E18 - Naked Chaos
programme.desc: A boater goes off the deep end; a naked man causes traffic chaos; a police uniform-swiper gets taken to the cleaners; and more!

programme.title: E4 - The Devil In Hammond
programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.title: E123 - Murder In Treme
programme.desc: A beloved mother is found stabbed to death in a vacant lot, and when New Orleans detectives investigate the case, their only suspect seems an unlikely killer.

programme.title: E1 - Reckless Driver Or Tragic Accident?
programme.desc: A woman faces life in prison when a passenger in the car she is driving is killed after she collides with an 18-wheel truck. Was she an intoxicated driver, or was it a tragic accident?

programme.title: E4 - Bourbon Street Drive-By
programme.desc: Det. Nick Davis investigates a homicide in the French Quarter after an innocent bystander is shot and killed. With minimal evidence at the crime scene, Det. Davis tracks a car seen fleeing Bourbon Street.

programme.title: E123 - Murder In Treme
programme.desc: A beloved mother is found stabbed to death in a vacant lot, and when New Orleans detectives investigate the case, their only suspect seems an unlikely killer.

programme.desc: A woman faces life in prison when a passenger in the car she is driving is killed after she collides with an 18-wheel truck. Was she an intoxicated driver, or was it a tragic accident?

programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.desc: A beloved mother is found stabbed to death in a vacant lot, and when New Orleans detectives investigate the case, their only suspect seems an unlikely killer.

programme.title: E1 - Reckless Driver Or Tragic Accident?
programme.desc: A woman faces life in prison when a passenger in the car she is driving is killed after she collides with an 18-wheel truck. Was she an intoxicated driver, or was it a tragic accident?

programme.title: E4 - Bourbon Street Drive-By
programme.desc: Det. Nick Davis investigates a homicide in the French Quarter after an innocent bystander is shot and killed. With minimal evidence at the crime scene, Det. Davis tracks a car seen fleeing Bourbon Street.

programme.title: E8 - Killer Cried Wolf
programme.desc: Local police receive a distressing 911 call from 32-year-old Brian Redding. He is heard crying and screaming that he has found his 16-year-old girlfriend dead in their room.

programme.title: E3 - Danny Rolling: The Gainesville Ripper
programme.desc: Known for the murders of University of Florida students, Danny Rolling's first killings were in his hometown of Shreveport, Louisiana. He longed for a loving family, but he destroyed one instead.

programme.title: E8 - Killer Cried Wolf
programme.desc: Local police receive a distressing 911 call from 32-year-old Brian Redding. He is heard crying and screaming that he has found his 16-year-old girlfriend dead in their room.

programme.title: E3 - Danny Rolling: The Gainesville Ripper
programme.desc: Known for the murders of University of Florida students, Danny Rolling's first killings were in his hometown of Shreveport, Louisiana. He longed for a loving family, but he destroyed one instead.

programme.title: E8 - Killer Cried Wolf
programme.desc: Local police receive a distressing 911 call from 32-year-old Brian Redding. He is heard crying and screaming that he has found his 16-year-old girlfriend dead in their room.

programme.title: E3 - Danny Rolling: The Gainesville Ripper
programme.desc: Known for the murders of University of Florida students, Danny Rolling's first killings were in his hometown of Shreveport, Louisiana. He longed for a loving family, but he destroyed one instead.

programme.title: E5 - Highlight 5
programme.desc: In this episode a 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. 25 tonnes of metal must be removed from the lorry before it can be lifted and with a damaged 5th wheel, it’s a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit. At Crouch HQ there’s excitement in the air as the team give trucking superfan Chris and his disabled daughter, the ride of his life by taking him to his wedding in a big orange truck. Late at night, recovery op Snod is called to the side of the M69 to recover two crashed cars. With one on its side with the hand brake off, he must take care righting it to make sure it doesn’t roll into the passing traffic. It’s particularly tough job for Snod as his friend was killed on the same stretch of road whilst recovering a vehicle.

programme.title: E1 - Black Bear & Wild Rice
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the profound challenge of a bear hunt with fellow hunter and houndsman Sam. He also explores traditional methods for harvesting delicious wild rice with Arthur, Avani and Sara.

programme.title: E2 - Wild Turkey, Ramps & Fiddleheads
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the challenge of turkey hunting and learns the traditions of foraging fiddleheads and leaks with Avani, Arthur and Sara.

programme.title: E9 - Later, Alligator
programme.desc: Billy and Terry help a homeowner with an unwanted reptilian guest in her pool. Then Billy gets hot under the collar in a house infested with bedbugs.

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E8 - Kick the Bucket-List
programme.desc: For a thrill-seeking grandfather of two, there’s no such thing as retiring from life, but leave it to Bear Grylls to surprise even the most experienced adventurer. Together, they go full throttle to fulfill Art’s bucket list and capture a story worth telling his grandson back home.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild S1E8 -Kick the Bucket-List
programme.desc: For a thrill-seeking grandfather of two, there’s no such thing as retiring from life, but leave it to Bear Grylls to surprise even the most experienced adventurer. Together, they go full throttle to fulfill Art’s bucket list and capture a story worth telling his grandson back home.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips S1E1 -Murchison GeoRegion
programme.desc: Western Australia’s Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its’ ancient landscapes and brilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back to the earth’s beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled S1E7 -Victoria: The Southern Melting Pot
programme.desc: Sara goes to Melbourne to explore the food culture and find the best local ingredients. First stop, the Queen Victoria Market.

programme.title: Trucking Hell S2E5 -Highlight 5
programme.desc: In this episode a 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. 25 tonnes of metal must be removed from the lorry before it can be lifted and with a damaged 5th wheel, it’s a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit. At Crouch HQ there’s excitement in the air as the team give trucking superfan Chris and his disabled daughter, the ride of his life by taking him to his wedding in a big orange truck. Late at night, recovery op Snod is called to the side of the M69 to recover two crashed cars. With one on its side with the hand brake off, he must take care righting it to make sure it doesn’t roll into the passing traffic. It’s particularly tough job for Snod as his friend was killed on the same stretch of road whilst recovering a vehicle.

E6 - Baboon Lagoon
programme.desc: Enter the wilds of South Africa to get an intimate look into one of the continent’s most misunderstood primates. Like humans, these primates have unique personalities and share strong bonds with their families and friends.

programme.title: E5 - Ireland
programme.desc: Explore an island surrounded by the mighty Atlantic ocean, subjected to pounding waves and driving rain. From the Cliffs of Moher to the Giant’s Causeway, this land has been shaped and reshaped by the power of water and violent geological forces.

programme.title: Osprey: Sea Raptor
programme.desc: Wade into a saltwater marsh along the Connecticut River to witness the heartwarming reunion of two ospreys who’ve been mates for a decade. Witness their highs and lows over a single summer as they raise their chicks and dodge a host of predators.

programme.title: The Great Elephant Tale
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of three elephants across three very distinct African habitats. Their travels combine to tell the story of how these emotional and intelligent creatures evolved over millions of years to survive on the continent.

programme.title: Tusker: Brotherhood of Elephants
programme.desc: Become immersed in the intricate lives of tuskers with Craig, Pascal, and Esau, three male African elephants in all stages of life. Get a rare glimpse into the subtle language, complex interactions, and deep bonds of the world’s largest land mammal.

programme.title: Turtle Beach
programme.desc: Locals call it the ‘arribada’, or ‘arrival’. The magical days and nights when tens of thousands of sea turtles come ashore in Costa Rica, to lay millions of eggs.

programme.title: Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: Take a journey through the eyes of catfish, ocelots, and other native creatures with narrator Matthew McConaughey. Celebrate the Lone Star State’s landscapes and wildlife, and learn how crucial conservation efforts can save Texas’ unique habitats.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E1 - A Tale of Two Penguins
programme.desc: At the water’s edge a brave group of male penguins gather, preparing to make the dangerous journey ashore. With many threats ahead, there is safety in number and these petite penguins have important business to attend. It’s time to breed and they must find a burrow before the females arrive.

programme.title: E1 - Out of the Darkness
programme.desc: Winter releases her iron grip. In Iceland Arctic foxes scurry across mountains to mate. In Shetland an otter raises her cubs. In Norway a vast reindeer herd descends to the calving grounds. A huge March storm rages across the Stormborn lands.

programme.title: E3 - So Long and Thanks for All the Fish
programme.desc: Bundle up as an icy October storm complicates the race to the finish line. See Big Boi bounce after a stumble before tragedy hits QuadMom, and cheer as fan fave BoldFace hits her stride despite her clingy kid, Raccoon. But who will wear the crown?

programme.title: E474
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: E1516
programme.desc: The Great Era gives a wide selection of Phoenix outstanding documentaries, covering different topics and issues in question, and capturing life as it is.

programme.title: E481
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: E428
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.desc: The Titans release a small marshmallow ducky that the Easter Bunny had locked up, not knowing the danger they have unleashed.

programme.desc: In an accident with the Shrink Gun, a potted plant grows into a giant beanstalk and takes Lamput and the Docs up with it! It's a world inhabited by a giant and Skinny gets trapped!

programme.title: E33 - The Junk House In The Pond/A Super Hero's Day Off/An Adventure In The Jungle/A Day In
programme.desc: Shiro looks for the Bobobobobone in the deep pond while cleaning up the garbage. Deca tries to steal it disappearing into the pile of garbage.

programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Go Outside & Play with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's go outside & play with JJ! First, JJ & his friends gather all the pillows they can find to build a giant, cozy fort in the backyard. The outdoor fun continues as JJ's family rolls into a campsite for a big family vacation in their cool camper van! Then, join JJ & his grandparents for a fun-filled day at the train park. From taking care of Bingo to having a scavenger hunt at the beach with Cody, there are so many ways to play outside!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.desc: This time, Jamie shows us a roast dinner cooked all together in one pot, cutting down on washing up but never on flavour; and his store-cupboard version of a speedy carbonara that can use up whatever veg you have to hand.
